title: Internal error: JSON wrapper: unexpected type from json_unquote json_extract
bug_features_seed: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS bug;
CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data JSON, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, name) VALUES (1, JSON_OBJECT('x', NULL), 'test_name');
SELECT IFNULL(json_unquote(json_extract(data, '$.x')), 'default_value') FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: json_unquote fails when json_extract returns null
